summary: Tested Luna AI tab in bottom navigation and Birthday Club features. All 13 backend tests passed. Frontend UI tests confirmed: 5 tabs in bottom navigation (Tonight, Venues, Luna AI, Wallet, Profile), Luna AI chat interface working with quick questions and AI responses, Birthday Club accessible from Profile quick actions, floating AI button removed from home page.
critical_code_review_comments: Luna AI tab correctly added to bottom navigation in _layout.tsx with LunaAIIcon component
Luna AI chat interface (luna-ai.tsx) properly implements message handling, session continuity, and quick questions
Birthday Club page (birthday-club.tsx) correctly fetches /api/birthday/status and displays rewards based on birthday status
Floating AI button correctly removed from home page (index.tsx)
Birthday Club accessible from Profile quick actions grid at line 467-472 in profile.tsx
context_for_next_testing_agent: Luna AI tab and Birthday Club features fully tested. Luna AI chat uses /api/ai/chat endpoint with Claude via Emergent LLM integration. Birthday Club uses /api/birthday/status, /api/birthday/claim/{reward_id}, /api/birthday/redeem/{claim_id} endpoints. Bottom navigation has 5 tabs: Tonight, Venues, Luna AI, Wallet, Profile. Floating AI button removed from home page.

mocked_apis.AI_Features: LIVE - Using Claude API via Emergent LLM Key

luna_ai_tab.details: Luna AI tab visible in bottom navigation, chat interface loads with welcome message, quick questions work, AI responses received

luna_ai_chat.details: Chat sends messages and receives AI responses, session continuity maintained
